    Our servicesSTERILIZE · CROSS-LINK · ENHANCE

    What we put under the beam

    Three core services, one promise: consistent results and fast turnaround, batch after batch.

    01

    Medical Sterilization

    Safe, chemical-free sterilization for medical devices and pharma packaging - done in seconds, with nothing left behind.

    Medical & pharma
    View service
    02

    Polymer Cross-Linking

    Makes wires, cables, tubes, and moulded parts tougher - more heat-resistant and durable, with no chemical additives.

    WireCableHeat-shrink
    View service
    03

    Gemstone Enhancement

    Permanent colour for Topaz, Diamonds, and Quartz - accepted by GIA and IGI, trusted by jewellers and exporters.

    TopazDiamondQuartz
    View service
    See all E-beam services
    The technology

    One beam. Three industries.
    Zero chemicals.

    At the heart of every project is the electron beam - a focused stream of pure energy that treats your product in seconds. It runs on electricity and switches on and off like a light.

    Nothing touches your product except the beam itself. No chemicals, no residue, no waiting for gases to clear - goods arrive, get treated, and ship straight back to you.

    Electron beam in action
    How it worksREACH OUT → TREATMENT

    From first contact to treated goods

    Reach out, discuss your requirements, agree a time - then visit and get your goods treated.

    01

    Reach out

    Call, WhatsApp, or send the form - tell us about your product and what you need.

    02

    Discuss requirements

    Our team talks through your requirement and gives you a clear plan and quote.

    03

    Agree a time

    We fix a date and time that is feasible for both sides.

    04

    Visit & treat your goods

    Visit at the agreed time and have your goods treated exactly as discussed.

    See how E-beam processing works
    Industries servedREGULATED & INDUSTRIAL SECTORS

    Built for buyers who audit their suppliers

    Medical Devices

    Single-use disposables, implants, surgical textiles, diagnostic kits.

    Wire, Cable & Polymers

    Automotive and solar cable, heat-shrink, PEX pipe, engineered components.

    Gemstones

    Blue Topaz, fancy-colour Diamonds, Quartz - GIA/IGI-accepted treatment.

    Start a project

    Put your product
    under the beam.
